falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 rises 10% from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest a bullish trend, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: U.S. CPI data exceeds 4.5% YoY within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant inflation spike would indicate economic pressure inconsistent with the bottom_2024_aug pattern, falsifying the current analysis.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would signal a blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD and UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
